_comment_1: Ridian Agency — example Google OAuth client file (Desktop app type).
_comment_2: Copy this file to google_credentials.json and replace every PUT-* placeholder with the values from Google Cloud Console.
_comment_3: Steps: console.cloud.google.com -> APIs & Services -> Credentials -> Create OAuth Client ID -> Application type: Desktop app -> Download JSON. See QUICKSTART.md for the full walkthrough.
_comment_4: Both google_credentials.json and google_token.json are git-ignored. Do NOT commit either.
